description_long: This is a large, multi-functional wall unit made primarily of dark wood with contrasting light-colored cabinet doors. The structure features two tall side cabinets, multiple open shelves, and a central workspace with a pull-out keyboard tray and a mobile pedestal. The upper section includes several closed compartments with handles, while the lower section has drawers and additional cabinet doors. The design is modern, with a combination of open and closed storage spaces, making it suitable for use as a home office or study unit. The overall appearance is sleek and practical, with ample storage and display options.
description: A large, modern wall unit with dark wood and light cabinet doors, featuring shelves, drawers, and a central workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical design, with two tall side cabinets, open shelves, and a central workspace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and curved profile of the unit, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_2: Full frontal view displaying all storage compartments, drawers, shelves, and the pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the curved profile and depth seen in view 1.
